headings: (c) All of that property located at 789 Some Street, Bryan, TX 77801
text: - (e) The Subcontractor agrees to be bound to the Contractor by the terms of the Subcontract Documents and to assume to the Contractor all of the obligations and responsibilities for the Subcontractor's work that the Contractor, by the contract documents, assumes to the Owner. A copy of the Owner - Contractor contract is available for review by subcontractor at Contractor office during normal business hours.
